seoTitle: Set Up Meetings on Monday.com: Agendas & Action Items
metaDescription: Build a meeting management board in Monday.com to track agendas, attendees, action items, and meeting minutes in one connected workspace.
intro: Disorganized calendar invites and forgotten follow-ups make meetings less productive than they should be. This guide shows how to build a dedicated meeting management board in Monday.com, from tracking attendees and agendas to collaborating on live notes and turning takeaways into trackable tasks. It's for teams who want meetings to actually lead to action.

steps.heading: Create a meeting management board
steps.body: Set up groups such as Upcoming Meetings, Recurring Sessions, and Past Notes to organize your meeting workflow.

steps.heading: Add core meeting columns
steps.body: Use Date, People, Files, and Status columns to track meeting times, facilitators, attendees, slide decks, and action readiness.

steps.heading: Collaborate on live agendas
steps.body: Use Monday.com's Notes or Docs feature inside board cells to build and edit meeting agendas and action logs together in real time.

steps.heading: Automate agenda notifications
steps.body: Set up automations to notify team members when they're tagged in an agenda or assigned an action item.

steps.heading: Collect topic requests with a form
steps.body: Add a public Form View so team members can submit talking points that pipe directly into the upcoming agenda group.

steps.heading: Link minutes to project trackers
steps.body: Connect your meeting board to primary project boards so takeaways convert into live, manageable tasks.

faq.question: Can multiple people edit the meeting agenda at the same time?
faq.answer: Yes, the Notes or Docs feature inside board cells supports real-time collaboration on live meeting agendas.

faq.question: How do action items get assigned after a meeting?
faq.answer: You can link meeting minutes directly to project tracker boards so takeaways become manageable, assignable tasks.

faq.question: Can team members suggest topics before a meeting?
faq.answer: Yes, a public Form View lets people submit topic requests or talking points that flow into the upcoming agenda group automatically.

faq.question: Will people get notified when they're mentioned in an agenda?
faq.answer: Yes, automations can notify team members when they're tagged in an agenda item or assigned an action.
